# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: low-latency-service
        image: low-latency-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-service
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-proxy
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: database-proxy
        image: database-proxy:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: DB_HOST
          value: "external-database.example.com"
        - name: DB_PORT
          value: "5432"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-proxy
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: cache-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: redis
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          protocol: TCP
        command:
        - redis-server
        - --appendonly
        - "yes"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: cache-service
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: metrics-collector
        image: metrics-collector:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8125
          protocol: UDP
        env:
        - name: FLUSH_INTERVAL
          value: "1000"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "400m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: metrics-collector
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
  - name: statsd
    port: 8125
    targetPort: 8125
    protocol: UDP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-streaming
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: realtime-streaming
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-streaming
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: realtime-streaming
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: streaming-server
        image: realtime-streaming:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9000
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: MAX_CONNECTIONS
          value: "10000"
        - name: BUFFER_SIZE
          value: "4096"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
          limits:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-streaming
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: realtime-streaming
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  - name: streaming
    port: 9000
    targetPort: 9000
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: udp-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: udp-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: udp-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: udp-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: udp-server
        image: udp-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9999
          protocol: UDP
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: udp-service
  ports:
  - port: 9999
    targetPort: 9999
    protocol: UDP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: legacy-system
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: legacy-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: legacy-system
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: legacy-system
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: legacy-app
        image: legacy-system:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: LEGACY_MODE
          value: "true"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: legacy-system
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: legacy-system
  ports:
  - port: 8000
    targetPort: 8000
    protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
